error_signature: CORS policy: Response to preflight request doesn't pass access control check
title: CORS issue with Token Based Auth plugin
symptom: The API call to fetch the user fails due to CORS policy, blocking the request. The console shows an error indicating multiple values for 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin'.
applies_when: Fetching user data from a different origin
not_this_if: CORS headers are correctly configured on the backend
root_cause: The backend server is incorrectly configured to send multiple values for the 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header, which violates CORS policy. This leads to the preflight request failing and blocking the actual API call.
fix_steps: Update the backend server configuration to ensure 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin' sends only one value, e.g., '*'.
Test the API call again to confirm it succeeds without CORS errors.
agent_instruction: Ensure the backend server sends a single value for 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin'.
